programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: TBH 121
programme.desc: TBH 121

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E11
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S06E11

programme.title: Munsters 132
programme.desc: Munsters 132

programme.title: Addams Family 132
programme.desc: Addams Family 132

programme.title: Love Boat 110
programme.desc: Love Boat 110

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Due to her accidental switch of vials Judy is injected with a virus which will kill her if she does not receive an antidote within 14 hours Unfortunately the chimp has also left the compound to look for a leopard cub she became attached to

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jennifer is kidnapped by a man who wants to get some of the money from an old crime by holding his ex-partners wife who happens to be a dead ringer for Jennifer

programme.title: In Old Caliente
programme.desc: Americans come West to California in the hope of peaceful settlement

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: A town Marshal despite the disagreements of his newlywed bride and the townspeople around him must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon when the gang leader an outlaw he sent up years ago arrives on the noon train

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Its almost time for the Almost Annual Charity Show and everyone is looking forward to Steve and Billie Jo performing a duet together Those at the Shady Rest are thrown for a loop when Selma announces that she has been appointed the shows committee chair a job usually held by Kate In actuality Selma strong-armed Sam the overseer of the show into appointing her Regardless Selma wants a few changes to the performing roster including Steve singing with Henrietta instead

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: As she sees Steve as a nice young man and a possible future son-in-law Kate has his best interests and his welfare in mind She believes his life as a pilot is a dangerous one and as such she would like to see him in a different profession So when she learns that Steve has a journalism background she tries to convince Sam to turn over the running of the Hooterville World Guardian to Steve Sam agrees as he doesnt have time to do the newspaper justice With no crop dusting work to be had in the valley Steve accepts the offer

programme.title: TBH 208
programme.desc: TBH 208

programme.title: TBH 107
programme.desc: TBH 107

programme.title: Munsters 136
programme.desc: Munsters 136

programme.title: Munsters 102
programme.desc: Munsters 102

programme.title: Addams 211
programme.desc: Addams 211

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to the Prime Cut episode a group of recovering cannibals have a relapse and make the unfortunate decision to eat an intruder whos been contaminated with an alien disease

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno and Sam are a pair of hardcore gamblers who dont play for fun They challenge each other in a simple game of cards and the end result could be deadlier then they couldve ever bargained for

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: The gold-digging landowner of a Caribbean villa attempts to woo a haughty rich young woman with the aid of a potion made by his ex-lover; a voodoo priestess But trouble ensues when he ignores the warnings about the potion

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Predatory electronics salesman Jack Rhodes uses a video dating service to pick up lonely young women for one-night stands but meets his match in cunning enticing Barbara who invites Jack on a date to her high-rise apartment loft

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Taking a job with the railroad Eric meets and befriends a former prize fighter who was a childhood idol of his who is on the run from the mob after he refused to throw a fight But a bar-room brawl draws the mobs attention to the man

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A hostage incident takes Nick back to Berlin in 1966

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Ryan believes that a half-man half-monster comic-book hero has come to life and is responsible for the murder of a shopkeeper

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A priest who is giving last rights to a woman on death row is seduced and plans and unimaginable escape from the death house with a very tragic ending Later Violet Rodriguez attempts to escape the same way hoping for better results

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke need a new gun for a shooting contest Kate needs a new dress to be inducted into the PTA Theres just enough money in the cookie jar for one of them

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The McCoys find out that they are three months behind on their mortgage payments and will lose the farm if they cant come up with the money Grandpa fears that he will have to sell a 200 year old flintlock family rifle to get the payment

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: As music critics Max and the Chief enter the world of symphonic music and must save a contact from an exploding piano

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is working undercover on a ship trying to find the plans of a super-secret weapon

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is hired by a lady to transport to Washington DC a deadly virus that she stole so she can present it to Congress as proof that her company is conducting highly illegal and potentially lethal research

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Marital strife boils over in both the Post and Addison households and Mister Ed goes to work as an extra in a western movie

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed attempts to torpedo Wilburs plans to have him march in the Pagent Parade

programme.title: Hogans 320
programme.desc: Hogans 320

programme.title: Hogans 315
programme.desc: Hogans 315

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Fed up with a lack of respect from The Crew and low on self-esteem Parker puts in for a transfer But complications develop when McHale and The Boys work up a scheme to try to make him change his mind

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A new Navy Directive - Which states that all overweight Combat Officers are to be shipped out - Prompts Binghamton to see that McHale puts on an extra 6 pounds - Enough to put him over the limit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job Of course what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: KILL ROMMEL
programme.desc: During WWII US Lieutenant Morris and British captain Hull are assigned in a mission to kill Rommel

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: April Lopez returns as a lounge singer Bud and Margarets kids disrupt their parents second honeymoon with constant needs World War 2 veteran Frank and USO entertainer Eve reunite after thirty-five years

programme.title: WKRP 101
programme.desc: WKRP 101

programme.title: WKRP 122
programme.desc: WKRP 122

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Fredas new love interest turns out to be the new pastor of her church

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Molly wants to go to an exclusive private school

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: When a singer whos suppose to perform at the hotel is sexually assaulted she asks for private investigator So the manager calls Dan She wants Dan to keep it quiet out of fear that it could ruin her career and life So Dan asks Nelson to make it quiet He then goes to a rape counselor who tells Dan that her attacker will do it again What Dan doesnt know is that her attacker could be closer to her than he thinks

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 203
programme.desc: Hercules 203

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone helps prevents a suicide of a handless girl Daan wants to use revolutionary Taelon technology to help the girl for propaganda reasons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Kinkaids brother Max had disappeared during their last mission prior to Kinkaid running into the Blackwood team Now the team stumbles across an imprisoned Max while infiltrating an alien stronghold and rescue him Unknown to the team Max has been transformed into a Robocop-like entity programmed to execute Kinkaid

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dr Russells presumed-dead husband mysteriously reappears on a reconnaissance mission to a nearby planet

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Old moonshine runners Uncle Jesse and Boss decide to settle who is better once and for all in a race in nearby Hatchapee County However both of them have to beware of Hatchapee County Sheriff Emmitt Loomis while Uncle Jesse should be doubly concerned about Boss scheme to switch water with moonshine

programme.desc: Young 321

programme.title: The Streerts of San Francisco
programme.desc: A narcotics cop driven over the edge laces a batch of cocaine with cyanide and sets it loose on the streets

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMFs target is Poltroni an international drug dealer Poltroni alias Ted Carson is in a country with no extradition treaty with the United States Briggs devises a plan to lure Poltroni to a neighboring country where he can be arrested and sent to the US To execute the scheme Barney will have to fight for his life against one of Poltronis thugs while Cinammon will be bait for Poltroni Also getting Poltroni to the border wont be easy Its about 100 miles away

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working day watch and must go to the hospital when a veteran police officer and his young partner are seriously wounded in a liquor store holdup where they deal with very different reactions of the wives

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives investigate an especially creepy college freshman suspected of the sniper-rifle deaths of two people for no apparent reason other than the sport of killing

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Audrics image is being projected from a body of water on a planet Jayce goes down to investigate even though Monster Minds are busy draining the water off Jayce meets the fish people the XHal and the Old One and they communicate by telepathy

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: On the ice planet Auriga revolutionary leader Cyrilla makes a deal with Saw Boss -- she delivers Jayce in return for Saw Boss deposing the gangster casino owner Marduk whos made slaves of everyone on the planet Cyrilla realizes her error

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Gloria reports that Acapulcos resorts have turned into a scorching desert When MASK investigates they find VENOM working with a hotel owner who wants to make all the surrounding land worthless

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Warrior With a Closed Heart

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Resurrected! Transformation of Rage

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and Pit are on their way back from Dragons Den when they get ambushed by the Sheriff of Nottinghams soldiers Kevin and Pit join forces with Robin Hood to defeat the Sheriff

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: In Hoopland an inventor is annoyed that he is small so he builds a robot and makes a wish however when the wish goes wrong; Captain N Princess Lana and Larry Bird help him by going into Hoop Mountain and face Clockman

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain try to derail MADs plan to steal an entire train carrying sophisticated computers that will help their operation

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to infiltrate MADs laboratory that is producing a sleeping gas so powerful that it will send everyone in the world to fall asleep

programme.title: Go Bots
